title: India’s beaten-down largecaps set to rebound on foreign flows
summary: Large-cap Indian stocks are expected to narrow their underperformance to smaller peers soon. Foreign investors are returning to Indian equities, boosting large-cap prospects. This trend suggests a potential rotation back into these larger companies.
